name: netdust-agent
description: Netdust two-layer agent harness — a SKELETON layer (steps, gates, ordering: harnessed-development entry sequencer + the gates it fires: writing-plans, testing-workflow, threat-modeling, architecture-invariants, feature-acceptance, test-effectiveness, shake-out, finishing-a-branch, compounding, evaluating) and a CRAFT layer (gerund-named how-to the harness reaches for at each step: writing-tests, designing-apis, building-frontend, engineering-context, versioning-with-git, driving-the-browser, refining-ideas, sourcing-from-docs, doubting-decisions, simplifying-code, deploying). Naming convention: gerund = craft (how), phase/gate noun = harness (when/whether). Built on superpowers (base) + addyosmani/agent-skills (craft fills, MIT) with Netdust discipline as the authoritative spine. Standalone; intended to replace the harness pieces of netdust-core.
